title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Bolloré Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Bolloré Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Bolloré Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Bengaluru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bolloré Logistics India:
Bolloré Logistics India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bolloré Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
